analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states it is useful for China and the US to draw up three lists, without specifying content or value judgments. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not promoted; no criticism of the US or West. CH2 (China benevolent internationally) – Not clearly promoted; while suggesting cooperation (lists) could imply constructive engagement, the tweet offers no explicit framing of China as benevolent or supporting multilateralism/justice. CH3 (epic history) – Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – Not addressed. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not addressed. CH6 (culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet is too vague to map to any listed narrative.
